labels.micro_objective: Enter safely, read the bell tower silhouette, and learn the main route color language.
labels.landmark: broken station gate under a hanging moss bell

labels.micro_objective: Rest at the first save and see a locked return path above the main route.
labels.landmark: small balcony save point looking over the entry spine

labels.micro_objective: Drop into a safe lower pocket, meet the route hint NPC, and return to the spine.
labels.landmark: low moss alcove with map witness

labels.micro_objective: See a sealed shortcut door from the wrong side before reaching its lever later.
labels.landmark: green-etched locked grate facing the entry route

labels.micro_objective: Choose between the main path, upper shaft, and reward branch while keeping the bell tower visible.
labels.landmark: wide bell court with three visible exits

labels.micro_objective: Climb a partial shaft and preview a ledge that will become easier after the first ability.
labels.landmark: mossy vertical shaft with a high brass lip

labels.micro_objective: Cross the shaft midpoint, collect a side reward, and identify the lower return passage.
Find the second shortcut lock and understand that the shaft will later fold back on itself.
labels.landmark: sealed root gate beside lower shaft water

labels.micro_objective: Enter the rain canopy loop and read both the high branch and lower return route.
Pick up the first chapter ability and immediately use it to cross a short, safe span.
labels.landmark: thread hook shrine above the canopy

labels.micro_objective: Talk to the route hint NPC, then choose main bridge or lower loop.
Take the upper loop reward and drop back near the main route.
Open the canopy shortcut from the far side and feel the route collapse back to the hub.
labels.landmark: lever room with visible locked grate below

labels.micro_objective: Enter the root well, survive a small elite fight, and earn access to the lower water loop.
Recover after the well fight and choose whether to press into the lower reward pocket.
Introduce the second ability with a compact lock-and-return lesson.
labels.landmark: training yard with split floor and return lip

labels.micro_objective: Grant the final chapter key and point the player toward the boss approach loop.
Save, read the boss silhouette, and prepare for a short final approach.
labels.landmark: quiet bench under the outer court bell tower
